segments.text: As Jesus was leaving the temple, one of His disciples said to Him,
Teacher, look at the magnificent stones and buildings!
segments.speaker: Disciple

segments.text: Do you see all these great buildings?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus replied.
Not one stone here will be left on another; every one will be thrown down.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: While Jesus was sitting on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter, James, John, and Andrew asked Him privately,
Tell us, when will these things happen? And what will be the sign that they are about to be fulfilled?
segments.speaker: Peter, James, John, and Andrew

segments.text: Jesus began by telling them,
See to it that no one deceives you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Many will come in My name, claiming, ‘I am He,’ and will deceive many.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When you hear of wars and rumors of wars, do not be alarmed. These things must happen, but the end is still to come.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. There will be earthquakes in various places, as well as famines. These are the beginning of birth pains.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So be on your guard. You will be delivered over to the councils and beaten in the synagogues. On My account you will st and before governors and kings as witnesses to them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And the gospel must first be proclaimed to all the nations.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But when they arrest you and hand you over, do not worry beforehand what to say. Instead, speak whatever you are given at that time, for it will not be you speaking, but the Holy Spirit.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Brother will betray brother to death, and a father his child. Children will rise against their parents and have them put to death.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You will be hated by everyone because of My name, but the one who perseveres to the end will be saved.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So when you see the abomination of desolation standing where it should not be(let the reader understand), then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Let no one on the housetop go back inside to retrieve anything from his house.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And let no one in the field return for his cloak.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: How miserable those days will be for pregnant and nursing mothers!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Pray that this will not occur in the winter.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For those will be days of tribulation unmatched from the beginning of God’s creation until now, and never to be seen again.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If the Lord had not cut short those days, nobody would be saved. But for the sake of the elect, whom He has chosen, He has cut them short.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: At that time if anyone says to you, ‘Look, here is the Christ!’ or ‘There He is!’ do not believe it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For false Christs and false prophets will appear and perform signs and wonders that would deceive even the elect, if that were possible.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So be on your guard; I have told you everything in advance.
segments.speaker: Jesus

text: The Return of the Son of Man

segments.text:
But in those days, after that tribulation:
‘The sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give its light;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: the stars will fall from the sky, and the powers of the heavens will be shaken.’
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: At that time they will see the Son of Man coming in the clouds with great power and glory.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And He will send out the angels to gather His elect from the four winds, from the ends of the earth to the ends of heaven.
segments.speaker: Jesus

text: The Lesson of the Fig Tree

segments.text: Now learn this lesson from the fig tree: As soon as its branches become tender and sprout leaves, you know that summer is near.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So also, when you see these things happening, know that He is near, right at the door.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Truly I tell you, this generation will not pass away until all these things have happened.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Heaven and earth will pass away, but My words will never pass away.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: No one knows about that day or hour, not even the angels in heaven, nor the Son, but only the Father.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Be on your guard and stay alert! For you do not know when the appointed time will come.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: It is like a man going on a journey who left his house, put each servant in charge of his own task, and instructed the doorkeeper to keep watch.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Therefore keep watch, because you do not know when the master of the house will return—whether in the evening, at midnight, when the rooster crows, or in the morning.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Otherwise, he may arrive without notice and find you sleeping.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And what I say to you, I say to everyone: Keep watch!
segments.speaker: Jesus
